tasks.title: Database schema for User, TelegramChat, PriceRecord, and Alert entities
Telegram Bot API integration for message sending and command handling
Cryptocurrency price API (CoinGecko) integration for BTC data
Periodic BTC price polling and percentage change calculation
10% threshold alert triggering and Telegram message formatting
Alert history storage and /history command display
API failure handling and retry/cooldown logic
/start, /help, and /setchat command flows with state transitions
